chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No. 745 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No. 21 & 26. 2. For order on CMA No. 4263/2022. (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case. 10.10.2025 Syed Shohrat Hussain Rizvi, advocate for applicant. Under instructions learned counsel does not press this reference application, which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
